archetype.name: Knight Reclaimant
archetype.note: This archetype offers Sneak Adept at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Verduran Shadow
archetype.note: This archetype offers Sneak Adept at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Sneak Adept
feat.text: It’s almost impossible to spot you. When you roll a failure on a Sneak action, you get a success instead. You can still critically fail.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
